template.name: Template Plugin
template.description: This is a template plugin that serves as a starting point for creating new plugins. It includes basic structure and example code to help developers get started quickly.
template.author: Ecxo Interactive

fishbot.name: Fishbot 3.0
fishbot.description: Fishbot 3.0 is a powerful and efficient fishing bot designed to automate the fishing process in various games. It offers advanced features such as customizable fishing patterns, auto-repair, and support for multiple game versions. With Fishbot 3.0, you can enjoy a seamless fishing experience while maximizing your in-game rewards.
fishbot.author: dummtoby
